args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' ORDER BY caseid__c, createddate;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' ORDER BY caseid__c, createddate;

args.query:
WITH owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c),'^#','') AS owner_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c),'^#','') AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
assign_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, count(*) AS cnt, min(owner_id) AS owner_id
  FROM owner_assigns
  GROUP BY case_id
),
single_assign_cases AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id FROM assign_counts WHERE cnt = 1
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS createddate, closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
)
SELECT sa.owner_id AS agent_id,
       count(c.id) AS cases_handled,
       avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM single_assign_cases sa
JOIN cases_in_period c ON regexp_replace(trim(c.id),'^#','') = sa.case_id
GROUP BY sa.owner_id
HAVING count(c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH owner_assigns AS (

  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
assign_counts AS (

  FROM owner_assigns
  GROUP BY case_id
),
single_assign_cases AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id FROM assign_counts WHERE cnt = 1
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS createddate, closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
)
SELECT sa.owner_id AS agent_id,
       count(c.id) AS cases_handled,
       avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM single_assign_cases sa
JOIN cases_in_period c ON regexp_replace(trim(c.id),'^#','') = sa.case_id
GROUP BY sa.owner_id
HAVING count(c.id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c),'^#','') AS owner_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c),'^#','') AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS createddate, closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
),
case_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ca.case_id, count(*) AS assign_count,
         min(ca.owner_id) FILTER (WHERE ca.owner_id IS NOT NULL) AS sole_owner
  FROM owner_assigns ca
  WHERE ca.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY ca.case_id
),
agent_involvements AS (
  SELECT oa.owner_id AS agent_id, count(DISTINCT oa.case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM owner_assigns oa
  WHERE oa.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY oa.owner_id
),
single_assign_case_times AS (
  SELECT cac.sole_owner AS agent_id,
         (c.closeddate - c.createddate) AS duration
  FROM case_assign_counts cac
  JOIN cases_in_period c ON c.id IS NOT NULL AND regexp_replace(trim(c.id),'^#','') = cac.case_id
  WHERE cac.assign_count = 1
    AND cac.sole_owner IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(ai.agent_id),'^#','') AS agent_id
FROM agent_involvements ai
JOIN (
  SELECT agent_id, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM duration)) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM single_assign_case_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
) avg_times ON avg_times.agent_id = ai.agent_id
WHERE ai.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY avg_times.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c),'^#','') AS owner_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c),'^#','') AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS createddate, closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
),
case_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ca.case_id, count(*) AS assign_count,
         min(ca.owner_id) FILTER (WHERE ca.owner_id IS NOT NULL) AS sole_owner
  FROM owner_assigns ca
  WHERE ca.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY ca.case_id
),
agent_involvements AS (
  SELECT oa.owner_id AS agent_id, count(DISTINCT oa.case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM owner_assigns oa
  WHERE oa.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY oa.owner_id
),
single_assign_case_times AS (
  SELECT cac.sole_owner AS agent_id,
         (c.closeddate - c.createddate) AS duration
  FROM case_assign_counts cac
  JOIN cases_in_period c ON c.id IS NOT NULL AND regexp_replace(trim(c.id),'^#','') = cac.case_id
  WHERE cac.assign_count = 1
    AND cac.sole_owner IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(ai.agent_id),'^#','') AS agent_id
FROM agent_involvements ai
JOIN (
  SELECT agent_id, avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM duration)) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM single_assign_case_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
) avg_times ON avg_times.agent_id = ai.agent_id
WHERE ai.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY avg_times.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL AND closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate < '2023-09-03' LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL AND closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate < '2023-09-03' LIMIT 50;

args.query:
WITH owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c),'^#','') AS owner_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c),'^#','') AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
)
SELECT cac.assign_count, count(*) AS num_cases
FROM (
  SELECT ca.case_id, count(*) AS assign_count
  FROM owner_assigns ca
  WHERE ca.case_id IN (SELECT case_id FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY ca.case_id
) cac
GROUP BY cac.assign_count
ORDER BY cac.assign_count;

  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
)
SELECT cac.assign_count, count(*) AS num_cases
FROM (
  SELECT ca.case_id, count(*) AS assign_count
  FROM owner_assigns ca
  WHERE ca.case_id IN (SELECT case_id FROM cases_in_period)

ORDER BY cac.assign_count;

args.query:
WITH owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c),'^#','') AS owner_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c),'^#','') AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS createddate, closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
),
single_assign_cases AS (
  SELECT ca.case_id, min(ca.owner_id) AS owner_id
  FROM owner_assigns ca
  WHERE ca.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY ca.case_id
  HAVING count(*) = 1
),
agent_involvements AS (
  SELECT oa.owner_id AS owner_id, count(DISTINCT oa.case_id) AS involvement_count
  FROM owner_assigns oa
  WHERE oa.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY oa.owner_id
)
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(ai.owner_id),'^#','') AS agent_id,
       avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cip.closeddate - cip.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
       count(sac.case_id) AS num_single_assigned_cases,
       ai.involvement_count
FROM agent_involvements ai
JOIN single_assign_cases sac ON sac.owner_id = ai.owner_id
JOIN cases_in_period cip ON regexp_replace(trim(cip.id),'^#','') = sac.case_id
WHERE ai.involvement_count > 1
GROUP BY ai.owner_id, ai.involvement_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
),
single_assign_cases AS (
  SELECT ca.case_id, min(ca.owner_id) AS owner_id
  FROM owner_assigns ca
  WHERE ca.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY ca.case_id
  HAVING count(*) = 1
),
agent_involvements AS (
  SELECT oa.owner_id AS owner_id, count(DISTINCT oa.case_id) AS involvement_count
  FROM owner_assigns oa
  WHERE oa.case_id IN (SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') FROM cases_in_period)
  GROUP BY oa.owner_id
)
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(ai.owner_id),'^#','') AS agent_id,
       avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cip.closeddate - cip.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
       count(sac.case_id) AS num_single_assigned_cases,
       ai.involvement_count
FROM agent_involvements ai
JOIN single_assign_cases sac ON sac.owner_id = ai.owner_id
JOIN cases_in_period cip ON regexp_replace(trim(cip.id),'^#','') = sac.case_id
WHERE ai.involvement_count > 1
GROUP BY ai.owner_id, ai.involvement_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp;

args.query:
WITH owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c),'^#','') AS owner_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c),'^#','') AS case_id,
         createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') AS case_id, createddate::timestamp AS createddate, closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
)
SELECT oa.owner_id AS agent_id,
       count(*) AS cases_assigned_in_history,
       count(DISTINCT oa.case_id) AS distinct_cases_involved,
       avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cip.closeddate - cip.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM owner_assigns oa
JOIN cases_in_period cip ON cip.case_id = oa.case_id
GROUP BY oa.owner_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c),'^#','') AS owner_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c),'^#','') AS case_id,
         createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
cases_in_period AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(id),'^#','') AS case_id, createddate::timestamp AS createddate, closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp < '2023-09-03'::timestamp
)
SELECT oa.owner_id AS agent_id,
       count(*) AS cases_assigned_in_history,
       count(DISTINCT oa.case_id) AS distinct_cases_involved,
       avg(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cip.closeddate - cip.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM owner_assigns oa
JOIN cases_in_period cip ON cip.case_id = oa.case_id
GROUP BY oa.owner_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC;
